O

onActivityResult(int, int, Intent) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.CreateEditEventActivity
Receives the result from the image picker and sets the selected image on the event image view.
onAttach(Context) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EditProfileFragment
Attaches the fragment to the host context and verifies that it implements EditProfileFragment.EditProfileDialogListener.
onAttach(Context) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.FilterEventsFragment
Attaches the fragment to the host context and verifies it implements FilterEventsFragment.EditFilterDialogListener.
onBindViewHolder(EventHistoryAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventHistoryAdapter
Binds event data to the row view at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.WaitlistAdapter
Binds a WaitlistUser to the given WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder, setting the name, remove button listener, and profile image if available.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.AdminHomeActivity
Initializes the admin home screen, sets menu item labels, and attaches navigation click listeners to each menu item and the profile button.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.CreateEditEventActivity
Initializes the activity, enables edge-to-edge display, inflates the layout, and delegates to CreateEditEventActivity.initViews(), CreateEditEventActivity.setupListeners(), and CreateEditEventActivity.setupEdgeToEdge().
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventDetailsActivity
Initializes the activity, binds UI components, retrieves the event ID from the launching Intent, and loads the event data from Firestore.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventDetailsOrganizer
Initializes the activity, reads the event ID from the intent, and loads event data from Firestore if the ID is present.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventEntrantOrganizer
Initializes the activity, reads the event ID from the intent, and sets up views and navigation listeners.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventHistoryActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the RecyclerView and adapter, retrieves the current user's ID, and triggers the initial data fetch.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventUserChoice
Initializes the activity, loads event data from Firestore, populates the UI, and redirects the user if they have already accepted the invitation.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventWaitlistTab
Initializes the activity, reads the event ID from the intent, and sets up views and navigation listeners.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.HomeActivity
Initializes the activity, loads the current user, fetches events from Firestore, and sets up navigation and filter button listeners.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.LoginActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the email and password fields, and attaches listeners to the login and create account buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.NewUserActivity
Initializes the activity, binds input fields, and attaches listeners to the register and login buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.OrganizerHomeActivity
Initializes the activity, populates the username and user ID fields, and sets up navigation listeners for the create event and events list buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.OrganizerListActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the back button, and loads the organizer list.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.OrgHomeActivity
Initializes the activity, loads the current organizer, displays their info, and sets up navigation buttons for event creation, events list, and profile.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.ProfileActivity
Initializes the activity, populates profile fields from the current user, and sets up listeners for the home, edit, delete, and sign-out buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.QrScannerActivity
Initializes the activity, binds UI components, sets up button listeners, and requests camera permission if it has not already been granted.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.StartActivity
Checks the current Firebase Authentication state and user role, then navigates to the appropriate activity based on login history and account type.
onCreateDialog(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EditProfileFragment
Inflates the fragment layout, pre-populates fields with the current user's data, and builds the alert dialog with Cancel and Edit buttons.
onCreateDialog(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.FilterEventsFragment
Inflates the filter dialog layout and builds the alert dialog with Cancel and Filter buttons.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventHistoryAdapter
Inflates the row layout for a single event history item.
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.WaitlistAdapter
Inflates the row layout for a waitlist item and returns a new WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder.
onFilterApplied(String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.HomeActivity
Applies the given filter criteria and reloads the events list from Firestore.
onPause() - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.QrScannerActivity
Pauses the barcode scanner when the activity moves to the background to conserve resources and release the camera.
onRemove(WaitlistUser, int) - Method in interface com.example.edgers_lottery.WaitlistAdapter.OnRemoveClickListener
Called when the remove button is clicked for a waitlisted user.
onRequestPermissionsResult(int, String[], int[]) - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.QrScannerActivity
Handles the result of the camera permission request.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.EventHistoryActivity
Refreshes event history data every time the user returns to this screen.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.edgers_lottery.QrScannerActivity
Resumes the barcode scanner when the activity returns to the foreground, but only if no QR code has been scanned yet in the current session.

Home screen activity for organizers.

Adapter that populates the organizer list in OrganizerListActivity.

Constructs a new adapter for the given list of organizers.
